# Redstring

> The Hiring OS

Redstring is an AI-powered hiring operating system that automates candidate sourcing, screening, and interview scheduling.

## Features
- **AI-Powered Candidate Sourcing**: Find the best talent across multiple platforms.
- **Automated Screening**: Assess candidates effortlessly without manual intervention.
- **Interview Scheduling**: Sync calendars and automate meeting setups.

## Links
- Homepage: https://www.redstring.co.in
- Dashboard: https://app.redstring.co.in

## Stack
This project is built using:
- Next.js (App Router)
- React
- Tailwind CSS
- TypeScript
